phase3_findings.description: Budget-RED control R4 prose said 'unbounded retry' and 'omitted the record'; raw answer showed a bounded retry and did report blocked/unreadable
'one-line description' was a paraphrase, not the frontmatter description field
Interpretation point 2 over-attributed R1 drop to routing table without stating the comparison basis
n=1 control design not framed as an explicit limitation
